====Traded to the player====
Upon the third unique interaction with Grusha in the League Club Room, he will trade a Cetoddle to the player in exchange for almost any Pokémon excluding {{Shiny}}, {{pkmn2|Legendary}}, or [[Mythical Pokémon]].
